boss.effect: #1# in #2# cards get drawn face down
boss.name: The Wheel

small.name: Small Blind

value.effect: Every played card counts in scoring

Earn $4 if poker hand is a Two Pair, poker hand changes at end of round
Creates up to 2 random Planet cards (Must have room)
